import React, { useState } from "react"; import {connect} from 'react-redux' import userActions from '../redux/actions/userActions' import Box from '@mui/material/Box' import MailIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Mail' import KeyIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Key' import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography' import {Link as LinkRouter} from "react-router-dom" import GoogleSignIn from "../components/GoogleSignIn"; import '../styles/signin-up.css' function SignIn(props) { const [email, setEmail] = useState("") const [password , setPassword] = useState("") const handleSubmit = async (event) => { event.preventDefault() const logedUser = { email: email, password: password, from: "form-Signin", } await props.signInUser(logedUser) } return (
Welcome!
setEmail(e.target.value)} required /> setPassword(e.target.value)} required /> Don't have an account yet? go to SignUp!
) } const mapDispatchToProps = { signInUser: userActions.signInUser } const mapStateToProps = (state) => { return { message: state.userReducers.message } } export default connect(mapStateToProps, mapDispatchToProps)(SignIn)
